attendee.title: Participation requirements
attendee.description: Complete the applicable safety steps before registering or joining the waitlist.
attendee.load_error_description: We could not verify the event's safety requirements. Try again before registering.
attendee.action_error: That safety step could not be completed. Try again.

reasons.unknown: A participation requirement still needs attention.
reasons.event_safety_unbound_guest_denied: Sign in to verify the participation requirements.
reasons.event_safety_user_not_active: Your member account is not currently active.
reasons.event_safety_bilateral_user_block: A member block prevents participation in this event.
reasons.event_safety_requirements_not_published: The organizer has not published the safety requirements yet.
reasons.event_safety_requirements_integrity_inva: The published safety requirements could not be verified.
reasons.event_safety_requirements_version_unavai: The published requirement version is unavailable.
reasons.event_safety_date_of_birth_required: Add your date of birth so age requirements can be checked.
reasons.event_safety_date_of_birth_invalid: Your recorded date of birth could not be verified.
reasons.event_safety_minimum_age_not_met: You do not meet this event's minimum age.
reasons.event_safety_minor_policy_unavailable: The policy for minor participation is unavailable.
reasons.event_safety_code_of_conduct_acknowledge: Acknowledge the current code of conduct.
reasons.event_safety_active_participation_denial: An active safety decision prevents participation.
reasons.event_safety_safeguarding_policy_denied: The safeguarding policy does not currently permit participation.
reasons.event_safety_safeguarding_policy_invalid: The safeguarding decision could not be verified.
reasons.event_safety_organizer_not_active: The event organizer is not currently active.
reasons.event_safety_denial_safeguarding_policy: A safeguarding policy decision prevents participation.

code.title: Code of conduct
code.confirm_read: I have read and agree to the complete code of conduct.

guardian.title: Guardian consent
guardian.description: The guardian receives a private, time-limited link. Their identity and consent token are never shown in the event roster.
guardian.privacy_notice: The address is encrypted for delivery and removed from the delivery envelope after processing.
